title: neltuma hassleri
intro: Neltuma hassleri, also known as the 'Red Passion Flower', is a flowering plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and heart-shaped leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, analgesic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Neltuma hassleri include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Neltuma hassleri can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to calm the nervous system and promote a good night's sleep.
